_comment: Authored by Claude. News daemon polls these queries every cadence. Emits news_flash events ONLY when a headline contains ≥1 required keyword AND the URL hasn't been seen before AND the query's cooldown has elapsed. Claude updates this as thesis shifts.

queries.query: Iran US ceasefire deal Islamabad talks
queries.note: Apr 22 expiry imminent. Trump Apr 20 extension 'highly unlikely'. Tehran skipped round 2 Islamabad talks Apr 20 calling US demands 'childish'. Added skip/walkout/Islamabad/childish keywords for talks-collapse signal.
Direct crude oil catalyst — fired 15 events this tick confirming blockade. Hormuz fully closed, ships attacked.
NEW — broader escalation coverage beyond Hormuz: US Navy actions, Israel involvement, Houthi resumption, regional ally responses.
OPEC+ approved +206k bpd May. Any surprise supply move = WTI whipsaw. Emergency meeting possible under blockade.

queries.query: Bank of Japan yen intervention MoF Katayama
queries.note: USDJPY 158.72 near 160 intervention line. FinMin Katayama G7 'high sense of urgency'. EconMin Akazawa floated BoJ hike as yen tool. BoJ Apr 27-28. Added Katayama/Akazawa/rate-check/urgency — pre-intervention verbal signals.
FOMC Apr 28-29 — Fed hold expected. Oil shock could push dovish (growth risk) or hawkish (inflation).
Market pricing May hike to 4.35%. Risk-off may force RBA to pause — AUD bid thesis broken under blockade.
26% tariff active — any deal progress reverses FII flow thesis.
